{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122111275877A7D9E19C1306F12"}"},"total":63709},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7132093647570584323","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[顶帖]开挂文可以用脑子去看的不多了（我也不用），而且一卦接一卦的燃[学会了]很喜欢这样的文笔，不拖沓也不快，对主角的塑造和点题的内容也很爱[求爆更][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660570036,"group_id":"7097114126693960704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"意难平","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6FsiCvlKXCeSVt+aq25yB8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72dc437f04fe41dcb86c824ca28bcd45~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618664&x-signature=cWEffDFEZJTey5vG8%2FevhDCICSg%3D","user_id":"558147082649838","user_name":"萋萋的七七"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"558147082649838","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7097114126693960704","book_info":{"abstract":"《贱萌反派+爽文+腹黑+轻松+老六+无节操+非无敌文》
秦风穿越荒古成为秦家大少爷，双胞胎二弟还是传说中的天选之子，更是拥有一块万中无一至尊骨。
本以为能抱着二弟的大腿走上人生巅峰，偏偏遇到个不正经系统跟他说做反派有前途。
“叮咚，挖出弟弟至尊骨，获得无敌重瞳！”
………
秦风：开什么玩笑，那可是我的挚爱亲朋，手足兄弟啊……桀桀桀桀，我愚蠢的欧豆豆，你感受到绝望了吗？
从此整个荒古都在唾弃他为了力量不择手段，可当真相曝光的那天，无数人被感动流泪，秦风这些年太不容易了……
新书《谁教他这样获取正能量的？》已发布，欢迎各位新老读者阅读……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c5cc9d44ed7d55b9824cd2b42565de12","author":"家养了只肥兔","author_id":"","book_id":"7097114126693960704","book_name":"这个反派有点良心，但是不多！","book_short_name":"风起荒古","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"55.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7097114747682128421","read_count":"551038","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4323552"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"2095","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,腹黑,反派,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b47d9b3d0e191d3763422f5575a0dfe2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286272&x-signature=4QuQ8a9Mv6wnUocxNt55Ipxpv%2BQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1829182464339453","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.860759e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122111275877A7D9E19C1306F12"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":802,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38607,"reply_count":19,"show_pv":436749},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7219684312055792419","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢这种风格，而且每天早晚六点准时更新。[爱慕]目前为止最大的缺点是更新太慢，住校回来攒了那么久结果看着看着就看完了，完全不够看，每次回家最期待的就是阅读新篇章，但是每次都不能看尽兴[委屈]希望这本书不要烂尾或者太监。我也推荐给朋友看了，因为作者太有趣了，超喜欢的；内容上不像其他绝大部分的书写着写着战力就崩的一塌糊涂，目前来说战力是比较稳定的，并且新章节会融入一些新的老的梗，非常有意思，总而言之是一部值得追的书（另外作者什么时候一天20章，在线等，急[飞吻]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680963805,"group_id":"7097114126693960704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时光流转，愿你与珍爱之人能够再次重逢。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N14fs9TOA/XGkz3fUFM89hb+1wAAvmiFSRP+F5DFRNmS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ae8459badee43d5b4ccd14ec159bccf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620206&x-signature=E30cJu7DyMz9vhgv%2Bb49dtsZ9n0%3D","user_id":"2576861833475288","user_name":"折柳寄望舒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2576861833475288","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7097114126693960704","book_info":{"abstract":"《贱萌反派+爽文+腹黑+轻松+老六+无节操+非无敌文》
秦风穿越荒古成为秦家大少爷，双胞胎二弟还是传说中的天选之子，更是拥有一块万中无一至尊骨。
本以为能抱着二弟的大腿走上人生巅峰，偏偏遇到个不正经系统跟他说做反派有前途。
“叮咚，挖出弟弟至尊骨，获得无敌重瞳！”
………
